orthography2ipa ‚ÄĒ language data explorer

Every registered orthography ‚Üí IPA spec, with its cited academic sources, in one browsable page.
production ‚ÄĒ full coverage, regression-tested, cited sources research ‚ÄĒ validated against published phonology; positional rules present skeleton ‚ÄĒ auto-generated graphemes/allophones, unvalidated stub ‚ÄĒ code + name + family + script only
Gold benchmark data is a grain of salt ‚ÄĒ PER is directional, not a certification. See docs/benchmarks.md and docs/scoreboard.md.

    Select a language from the list.

    Genetic descent from each spec's parent. Dashed rings are ancestry groupings (proto-languages, medieval stages) with no gold of their own. Click a name to open it.
